description: Verify production loop runs produce a hash-chained ledger, resumable checkpoints, typed handoff envelopes, and coordination decisions that can be replayed from recorded state.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; export HERMES_HOME="$tmp"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" loop-start --run-id replay-run --agent writer --task 'Write a source-backed outline for a product update.' > "$tmp/loop.json"; "$office" checkpoint-create --run-id replay-run --checkpoint-id cp1 --stage context --label 'context checkpoint' --resume-cursor context:ready --state-json '{"facts":["input captured"]}' --artifact context_snapshot:ok > "$tmp/checkpoint.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; json.dump({"kind":"digital-office-context-envelope","version":"2.0.1-research","context_id":"replay-run","run_id":"replay-run","task_id":"work-replay-run","context_version":1,"cycle_index":1,"from":{"type":"agent","id":"writer"},"to":{"type":"agent","id":"researcher"},"goal":"Return cited evidence.","user_intent":"Write a source-backed outline.","summary":"Evidence is needed before drafting.","current_stage":"context","constraints":[],"acceptance_criteria":["Researcher returns a cited source list."],"facts":[],"source_refs":[],"artifact_refs":[],"decisions":[],"open_questions":[],"omissions":[],"risk_flags":[],"permissions":{"tenant_id":"t1","project_id":"p1","requested_by":"u1","role":"project_manager","allowed_actions":["research"]},"context_budget":{"strategy":"hybrid","estimated_tokens":200,"max_tokens":1000,"compacted":False},"handoff_reason":"Need cited evidence before drafting.","state_hash":"0123456789abcdef","research_specific":{"literature_refs":["arXiv:2503.13657"],"hypothesis_lock":"Typed handoffs reduce context loss.","experiment_log_ref":"artifact://experiment-log"}},open(sys.argv[1],"w"))' "$tmp/context.json"; "$office" handoff-create --run-id replay-run --handoff-id h1 --from-agent writer --to-agent researcher --stage context --reason 'Need cited evidence before drafting.' --input-schema-json '{"required":["sources"]}' --context-file "$tmp/context.json" --artifact evidence_brief:pending --acceptance-criterion 'Researcher returns a cited source list.' > "$tmp/handoff.json"; hash=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["context_hash"])' "$tmp/handoff.json"); "$office" handoff-ack --run-id replay-run --handoff-id h1 --received-by researcher --decision accept --expected-context-hash "$hash" > "$tmp/ack.json"; "$office" coordination-plan --run-id replay-run --task 'Research three independent market examples in parallel.' --agent researcher --agent writer --parallelizable > "$tmp/coordination.json"; "$office" run-ledger-list --run-id replay-run > "$tmp/ledger.json"; "$office" checkpoint-list --run-id replay-run > "$tmp/checkpoints.json"; "$office" handoff-list --run-id replay-run > "$tmp/handoffs.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; ledger=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); events=ledger["events"]; names={e["event"] for e in events}; assert {"loop_start","checkpoint_created","handoff_created","handoff_acknowledged","coordination_plan_created"}.issubset(names); assert all(e.get("event_hash") for e in events); assert all("previous_event_hash" in e for e in events); checkpoints=json.load(open(sys.argv[2])); assert checkpoints["checkpoints"][0]["state_hash"]; handoffs=json.load(open(sys.argv[3])); assert handoffs["handoffs"][0]["handoff_contract_hash"] and handoffs["handoffs"][0]["status"]=="accepted"; coordination=json.load(open(sys.argv[4])); assert coordination["mode"] == "parallel_expert_dag"' "$tmp/ledger.json" "$tmp/checkpoints.json" "$tmp/handoffs.json" "$tmp/coordination.json"

set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" loop-start --run-id concurrent-run --task 'Verify concurrent ledger writes.' >/dev/null; export office; seq 1 16 | xargs -P 8 -I{} bash -c '"$office" run-ledger-add --run-id concurrent-run --event parallel_event --action ledger.parallel >/dev/null'; "$office" run-ledger-verify --run-id concurrent-run > "$tmp/verify.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"]=="valid"; assert data["event_count"]==17; assert not data["issues"]' "$tmp/verify.json"
